channel.title: Python on Ali Alshaarawy
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Ali Alshaarawy

item.title: Building cuda_swap: GPU Memory Overflow Without Code Changes
item.description: How we built an LD_PRELOAD library that transparently spills GPU memory to host RAM, and what we learned about CUDA’s memory API, framework allocators, and the real cost of unified memory along the way.
